title: Writing a Reusable SPI Driver in C11
brief: How to layer a portable SPI abstraction - HAL, driver, and device - so the same code targets STM32, NXP, and a PC test host running Unity tests without modification.

title: Priority Inversion in FreeRTOS - Root Cause and Fix
brief: A worked example of the classic priority-inversion bug in a CAN logging task, diagnosed with Tracealyzer, and fixed by switching from binary semaphore to mutex.

title: CAN Bus Arbitration - How It Really Works
brief: A byte-level walkthrough of non-destructive bit arbitration, with oscilloscope captures showing dominant-wins behaviour and why lower IDs always win without any packet loss.

title: Secure Boot with ECDSA on STM32
brief: End-to-end implementation: signing firmware in CI/CD with OpenSSL, verifying on-device with mbedTLS, protecting the public key with RDP, and adding anti-rollback via OTP fuses.

title: AUTOSAR Classic CP - A Practical Introduction
brief: How AUTOSAR's layered architecture, BSW stack, and RTE decouple application software from hardware in automotive ECUs - including the COM stack and UDS diagnostics.

title: Rust on Bare-Metal ARM - First Impressions
brief: Setting up a no_std Rust environment on STM32, writing an interrupt-driven UART driver with Embassy, and an honest comparison to C in terms of tooling and safety guarantees.

title: Zero-Copy Audio with DMA Double Buffering
brief: Using STM32 DMA double-buffer mode to stream 48 kHz I2S audio with no CPU involvement during transfer.

title: Debugging Yocto Build Failures
brief: A systematic approach to diagnosing recipe failures, dependency conflicts, and sstate cache invalidation in Yocto Kirkstone.

title: Building a CAN FD to Ethernet Gateway
brief: Design decisions, timing analysis, and lessons learned from a production CAN FD to UDP gateway running at 5 Mb/s.
